title: Cron Expression Parser
description:
Parse a standard 5-field cron expression and determine if a given datetime matches it.

Fields: minute (0-59), hour (0-23), day-of-month (1-31), month (1-12), day-of-week (0-6, 0=Sunday)

Support: exact numbers, wildcards (*), ranges (1-5), step values (*/15), and comma-separated lists (1,3,5).

Input: cron expression string, datetime as [year, month, day, hour, minute, weekday]
Output: true if the datetime matches

Example:
  Input: cron="*/15 9-17 * * 1-5", dt=[2026, 3, 2, 10, 30, 1]
  Output: true  (minute 30 matches */15, hour 10 matches 9-17, Monday matches 1-5)
hints: Parse each field into a set of valid values
Handle step values by generating: range(start, max+1, step)
author: Claudius
